use_cases: Collect user satisfaction on documentation and help pages
Gather quick thumbs up/down feedback on content usefulness
Rate article or guide helpfulness on knowledge bases
Survey users after completing onboarding steps
Get instant content feedback on websites and web apps
ai_summary: A compact feedback prompt component that asks users if a page was helpful with Yes/No thumbs buttons. Features smooth hover scale animations, click-triggered state change revealing a thank-you message, and full dark mode support. Designed as an atomic, drop-in widget for collecting satisfaction metrics on documentation sites, help centers, and content-heavy web applications.
